UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_ELECTRICAL_Push_ExternalPower_Template
UseTemplate.SEQ1_EMISSIVE_CODE: (A:EXTERNAL POWER AVAILABLE:1, Bool) (A:EXTERNAL POWER ON:1, Bool) and

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_LIGHTING_Switch_Light_Taxi_Template
UseTemplate.ON_STATE_CHANGED_EXTERNAL_CODE: (A:GEAR CENTER POSITION, Percent) 100 == (A:GEAR HANDLE POSITION, Bool) 0 != and 100 * 6 (>K:2:LIGHT_POTENTIOMETER_SET)

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_LIGHTING_Ambient_Template
UseTemplate.BOUNCE_POTENTIOMETER_PERCENT: (A:LIGHT CABIN POWER SETTING:1, Percent) (A:LIGHT CABIN ON:1, Bool) * (A:LIGHT CABIN POWER SETTING:2, Percent) (A:LIGHT CABIN ON:2, Bool) * + 100 min

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_LIGHTING_Ambient_Template
UseTemplate.BOUNCE_POTENTIOMETER_PERCENT: (A:LIGHT CABIN POWER SETTING:3, Percent) (A:LIGHT CABIN ON:3, Bool) *

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_LIGHTING_Ambient_Template
UseTemplate.BOUNCE_POTENTIOMETER_PERCENT: (A:LIGHT PANEL POWER SETTING:1, Percent) 0.75 * (A:LIGHT POTENTIOMETER:10, Percent) (A:LIGHT POTENTIOMETER:11, Percent) + (A:LIGHT POTENTIOMETER:12, Percent) + 3 / max

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_GT_Update
ASOBO_GT_Emissive_Gauge
UseTemplate.EMISSIVE_CODE: (L:XMLVAR_SpeedIsManuallySet) (A:CIRCUIT GENERAL PANEL ON, Bool) and if{ 1 } els{ 0 }

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_GT_Emissive_Gauge
UseTemplate.EMISSIVE_CODE: (L:XMLVAR_SpeedIsManuallySet) (A:CIRCUIT GENERAL PANEL ON, Bool) and if{ 1 } els{ 0 }

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_LANDING_GEAR_Lever_Gear_Template
UseTemplate.ON_STATE_CHANGED_EXTERNAL_CODE: (A:GEAR CENTER POSITION, Percent) 100 == (A:GEAR HANDLE POSITION, Bool) 0 != and 100 * 6 (>K:2:LIGHT_POTENTIOMETER_SET)

UseTemplate.Name: ASOBO_GT_Update
UseTemplate.UPDATE_CODE: (A:GEAR CENTER POSITION, Percent) 100 == (A:GEAR HANDLE POSITION, Bool) 0 != and 100 * 6 (>K:2:LIGHT_POTENTIOMETER_SET)
